# Garagol

> Garagol is a digital consultancy and studio. We advise and we build across everything digital: strategy, brand, marketing, and engineering. We help businesses plan, design, market, and ship, from first idea to launch and growth. We also build and run our own SaaS platform, IGNIFY. From startups to enterprise.

## Pages
- [Home](https://garagol.com/): Who we are, how we help, selected work, and our process.
- [Services](https://garagol.com/services): Strategy & Consulting (digital strategy, transformation, IT consulting, roadmapping), Brand & Design (brand identity, UI/UX, web design), Marketing & Growth (SEO, digital marketing, content, social, analytics), Build & Engineering (web/mobile, cloud/DevOps, data & AI, cybersecurity).
- [Work](https://garagol.com/work): Selected projects across strategy, brand, marketing, and engineering.
- [IGNIFY case study](https://garagol.com/work/ignify): A full-stack SaaS platform built from zero (native mobile apps, real-time messaging and calling, a secure cloud backend, payments, and an admin console).
- [About](https://garagol.com/about): Senior strategists, designers, marketers, and engineers who advise and build.
- [Pricing](https://garagol.com/pricing): Launch, Scale, Secure & Optimize, and Enterprise engagements. Price on request, no hidden fees.
- [Contact](https://garagol.com/contact): Start a project with a 5-question estimate or a quick inquiry. We reply within about 2 hours during business hours.

## Commitments
- We advise and we build: one team across strategy, brand, marketing, and engineering.
- Fast delivery: a first working draft within a week of kick-off.
- Secure and compliant by default.
- Transparent pricing and full ownership: everything we create is yours.

## Contact
- Email: hello@garagol.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/garagol/
